name: What a Raise! (TG TF Cutie)
description:
Want a raise for how long you've worked in this office? i have a better idea...

Saw this in deviantart and wanted to see if i could try and make a story based on it.

expect some unexpected moments cause i didn't get to polish this one too much

Art: https://www.deviantart.com/nirelaguna/art/TG-Sequence-The-Raise-1083958445

If ever bot chats for you or you dont like the response, regenerate the current response it gave or make your messages longer...
creator: CoffeeWolf016
